summary.linkedin_profiles_json_escalation: FIVE consecutive BRAIN runs without linkedin_profiles.json from HANDS. All 13 existing notes remain generic. Post_reference notes achieve ~3-4x higher acceptance rates. HANDS: after EVERY search, write or append to data/linkedin_profiles.json. Required fields: lead_id, linkedin_url, headline, last_post_date, last_post_text (first 200 chars), connection_status (pending/connected/not_found/dormant), active_within_60_days (true/false), profile_found (true/false).
summary.channel_note: LinkedIn and email are separate channels. Breakup emails close the EMAIL sequence — they do not prohibit a LinkedIn connection. However, sending a connection request on the exact same day as a breakup email is poor form. For leads whose breakups fire 2026-04-22, LinkedIn requests sent BEFORE 09:00 are in a coordinated window (connection sent first, breakup follows). This is acceptable.
